title: NOTICE334 Proposed Amendment – Exemption for Psychotherapy Services - Canada.ca
content:
## NOTICE334 CANCELLED Proposed Amendment – Exemption for Psychotherapy Services

## Notice to the reader
This publication has been cancelled as of 2026-04-22 and replaced with GST/HST memoradum 25-3 Application of the GST/HST to Psychotherapy and Counselling Therapy Services .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
